price: Wenn wir nur eine Ermahnung (gleich derjenigen) der Früheren hätten,
arabic: لَوۡ أَنَّ عِندَنَا ذِكۡرٗا مِّنَ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: law anna ʿindanā dhik'ran mina al-awalīna
